mission.title: opentofu: Static Evaluation Base, Module Sources, Backend Config
mission.description:
Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)
Resolves #286
Resolves #388

This is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.

Note: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.  This initial implementation will *not* prompt the user for missing variables and instead will print out an error.  A follow-up issue may be created to track the refactoring required to implement that correctly.

resolution.summary:
1. This is covered in the PR description.
2/3/4. Agreed, it's not a great pattern and could use some refinement.

Overall though, what were your thoughts on the actual goals of this PR?  The static evaluation. module source, and backend code?  What do you think about the usability of the static context for other scenarios we have planned?
steps: This is covered in the PR description.
